title: T-025 — API: allergen sequencing heuristic rule (allergen_sequencing_heuristic_v1)
prompt:
Implement basic allergen sequencing per PRD §10.2 (FR-PLAN-029) as DSL rule `allergen_sequencing_heuristic_v1` registered via T-007. Algorithm:
1. Query WOs WHERE status='RELEASED' AND production_line_id=X AND scheduled_start_time IN [window].
2. Annotate each WO with allergen_profile_snapshot.
3. Group: allergen-free → single-allergen (alphabetical per family) → multi-allergen.
4. Within group: FIFO by scheduled_start_time.
5. Update wo.scheduled_start_time respecting line capacity + operation durations.
6. Emit outbox event 'wo.sequencing_applied'.

Manual override (§10.5): WOs with sequencing_override=true are kept in place. priority='critical' WOs exempt by default (V-PLAN-SEQ-001).

RED test asserts grouping order, critical exemption, override skip, KPI emit.

pipeline_inputs.description: Basic allergen-aware WO ordering heuristic registered as DSL rule v1.
pipeline_inputs.details: Rule definition under `src/rules/planning/v1/allergen_sequencing_heuristic_v1.json`. Service in `src/server/services/sequencing-heuristic.ts`. Allergen family extraction reads allergen_profile_snapshot keys (per 03-TECHNICAL §10). FIFO tie-break by scheduled_start_time ascending then wo_number ascending.
acceptance_criteria: Given 3 WOs (allergen-free, gluten-only, multi-allergen) on same line, when sequencing runs, then resulting scheduled_start_time order is allergen-free → gluten-only → multi-allergen.
Given a WO with priority='critical', when sequencing runs, then its scheduled_start_time is unchanged (V-PLAN-SEQ-001).
Given a WO with sequencing_override=true, when sequencing runs, then its position is preserved.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/services/__tests__/sequencing-heuristic.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for ordering, critical exemption, override preservation, outbox emit.
risk_red_lines: Do not violate priority='critical' ordering — V-PLAN-SEQ-001.
Do not implement multi-line cross-optimization — that is 07-PLANNING-EXT scope.
